calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
David Prince, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Commercial Bank, a California Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness Arthur Ho, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Jose B. Amarillas DBA Angelita's Carniceria and Maria Del R. Bastidas as follows:
Damages $96,518.03
Prejudgment Interest $7,417.38
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $486.19 and for foreclosure of Plaintiff's security interest as set forth in the Complaint.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Continued To Dec-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
